headline: Here is why AerCap (AER) is Among the 10 Best European Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates to Buy
summary: AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE:AER) is one of the 10 Best European Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates to Buy. On April 30, 2026, TD Cowen analyst Moshe Orenbuch raised the price target on AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE:AER) to $175 from $170 and maintained a Buy rating, citing a broad-based Q1 beat driven by higher gains on […]
